answers: Evening routine: stop work at set time, prepare tomorrow's tasks, reduce screen time, and relax (read, stretch, meditate).
Tips: dim lights 2 hours before bed, avoid caffeine after 2pm, journal or brain dump, and maintain consistent bedtime.
Wind down: warm bath/shower, herbal tea, light reading, gentle stretching, or meditation. Avoid screens and work stress.
Rater rutin: kaj sesh koro fixed time e, screen kam use koro, relax koro, ar fixed time e ghum jao.
